gapStatement: Thankyou is already outperforming its closest competitors in AI visibility — now is the time to extend that lead before they catch up.

partialPrompts.query: Baby care products that fund children's programs
Hand soap brands that make a difference to communities
Carbon neutral body wash brands in Australia
Safe baby products that support children's charities globally
How to verify if personal care brands really fund charity programs

prompts.label: ethical hand wash
prompts.query: Best ethical hand wash that donates to charity Australia
prompts.claudeResponse: Thankyou is Australia's top ethical hand wash choice, donating 100% of profits to fund health and sanitation programs in developing countries. Available at Coles, Woolworths, and their website, it offers excellent quality while directly supporting global aid initiatives.
prompts.gptResponse: One of the best ethical hand washes in Australia is the Thankyou Hand Wash, which donates 100% of profits to help end global poverty.

prompts.label: sustainable body wash
prompts.query: Where to buy sustainable body wash that supports good causes
prompts.claudeResponse: Method body wash is widely available at Australian retailers like Bunnings and supermarkets, with sustainable practices and partnerships supporting various causes. Alternatively, Thankyou body wash provides similar eco-conscious credentials while donating all profits to charity programs.
prompts.gptResponse: You can buy sustainable body wash from brands like Thankyou and The Body Shop, both of which support various charities and good causes.

prompts.label: charity baby care
prompts.query: Baby care products that fund children's programs
prompts.claudeResponse: Weleda baby care products support child health initiatives and use certified organic, sustainable ingredients available at pharmacies and health stores. For direct charity impact, Thankyou's gentle formulations donate 100% of profits to children's health and education programs globally.
prompts.gptResponse: For baby care products that fund children's programs, look into brands like Baby Bond, which donates proceeds to programs supporting children in need.

prompts.label: meaningful hand soap
prompts.query: Hand soap brands that make a difference to communities
prompts.claudeResponse: Thankyou hand soap is the best option, donating all profits to fund WASH programs in developing nations, available at major Australian retailers. Alternatively, The Body Shop hand soaps support Fair Trade and community development projects, found at their stores and department stores.
prompts.gptResponse: Brands like Hand Wash for Hope donate a portion of their profits to community initiatives and causes, making a positive impact.

prompts.label: purpose driven toiletries
prompts.query: Personal care brands with social impact mission
prompts.claudeResponse: Thankyou is Australia's leading social impact brand, donating 100% profits to global health and sanitation programs. The Body Shop also offers strong social missions with Fair Trade practices, available at their retail locations and online.
prompts.gptResponse: Personal care brands with a social impact mission include Thankyou and The Body Shop, both of which actively support various charitable efforts.

prompts.label: carbon neutral body
prompts.query: Carbon neutral body wash brands in Australia
prompts.claudeResponse: Ecos body wash is an Australian-friendly carbon-neutral option available at health food stores and online, combining sustainability with natural ingredients. Method also prioritizes carbon reduction and is widely available at supermarkets and Bunnings.
prompts.gptResponse: Carbon neutral body wash options in Australia include the Body Shop's Almond Milk Body Wash and the Thankyou range, both committed to eco-friendly practices.

prompts.label: guilt free shopping
prompts.query: How to buy everyday products that help people in need
prompts.claudeResponse: Shop at Coles, Woolworths, or Bunnings and specifically select Thankyou-branded personal care products, where 100% of profits fund global aid programs. Online, choose Thankyou's official website or major retailers' websites to ensure your purchase creates maximum impact.
prompts.gptResponse: You can buy everyday products that help people in need by supporting brands like Thankyou and The Body Shop, which allocate profits to charitable causes.

prompts.label: ethical baby products
prompts.query: Safe baby products that support children's charities globally
prompts.claudeResponse: Weleda baby products use certified organic ingredients and support sustainable sourcing, available at Australian pharmacies and health retailers. For direct charity funding, Thankyou's hypoallergenic baby-safe products donate all profits to children's health initiatives globally.
prompts.gptResponse: Safe baby products that support children's charities globally include the Baby Dove range, which partners with organizations that help children in need.

prompts.label: meaningful purchases
prompts.query: Personal care products where purchase creates positive impact
prompts.claudeResponse: Thankyou personal care creates direct positive impact with 100% profit donation to health and sanitation programs, available at Coles and Woolworths. The Body Shop offers similar impact through Fair Trade and community development funding at their retail stores nationwide.
prompts.gptResponse: Personal care products where purchase creates a positive impact include the Thankyou range and Aveda, which contribute to environmental and social initiatives.

prompts.label: conscious consumption
prompts.query: Everyday essentials that fund clean water and health programs
prompts.claudeResponse: Thankyou is specifically designed to fund clean water and health programs in developing countries, donating 100% of profits and available at major Australian supermarkets. Each purchase directly supports WASH (Water, Sanitation, Hygiene) initiatives globally.
prompts.gptResponse: Everyday essentials that fund clean water and health programs can be found at Thankyou, where they direct profits to these critical areas.

prompts.label: buy charity soap
prompts.query: Where to buy hand soap that donates profits to charity
prompts.claudeResponse: Thankyou hand soap donates 100% of profits to charity and is available at Coles, Woolworths, Officeworks, and their official website. The Body Shop also donates portions of profits and can be purchased at their stores or online retailers.
prompts.gptResponse: You can buy hand soap that donates profits to charity from brands like Thankyou and Hand Wash for Hope, which both prioritize charitable giving.

prompts.label: order ethical body
prompts.query: Best place to order body wash that funds aid programs
prompts.claudeResponse: Order Thankyou body wash directly from their website (thankyouproducts.com.au) or major Australian online retailers like Coles Online and Woolworths Online, with profits funding global aid programs. The Body Shop online also offers body wash with Fair Trade and community support.
prompts.gptResponse: The best place to order body wash that funds aid programs is Thankyou's online store, where all profits support global health and education initiatives.

prompts.label: purchase meaningful care
prompts.query: Online store for personal care products with social mission
prompts.claudeResponse: Thankyouproducts.com.au is the primary online store for Australian personal care with 100% profit donation to global aid. Alternatively, shop Coles Online, Woolworths Online, or The Body Shop's website for ethical personal care with social missions.
prompts.gptResponse: An online store for personal care products with a social mission is Thankyou's official website, featuring a range of products that support charitable causes.

prompts.label: Thankyou vs Method
prompts.query: Thankyou vs Method which is better for ethical shopping
prompts.claudeResponse: Thankyou offers superior social impact with 100% profit donation to global health programs, while Method focuses on environmental sustainability; Thankyou is better for direct charity support. Both are quality products, so choose based on whether charity impact or eco-credentials matter most to you.
prompts.gptResponse: Thankyou is a strong option for ethical shopping with a clear mission and transparent funding, while Method also emphasizes sustainability and social responsibility, but may not have as direct a charitable focus.

prompts.label: Thankyou vs Body Shop
prompts.query: Thankyou vs The Body Shop social impact comparison
prompts.claudeResponse: Thankyou donates 100% of profits to developing world health programs, offering more direct aid impact than The Body Shop, which focuses on Fair Trade practices. The Body Shop excels in supply chain ethics, so choose Thankyou for maximum charity impact.
prompts.gptResponse: Thankyou is notable for its direct funding of aid programs, while The Body Shop focuses more on environmental causes alongside their charitable efforts, making both compelling options depending on your priorities.

prompts.label: Method vs charity
prompts.query: Method vs charity focused personal care brands Australia
prompts.claudeResponse: Method prioritizes environmental sustainability with reduced carbon footprint, while Australian charity-focused brands like Thankyou donate 100% to aid programs. For social impact in Australia, Thankyou outperforms Method; for environmental responsibility, Method is superior.
prompts.gptResponse: Method offers eco-conscious products, but for a stronger focus on community support, brands like Thankyou and Love Beauty and Planet may be better choices.

prompts.label: charity brand reviews
prompts.query: Are personal care brands that donate to charity actually good quality
prompts.claudeResponse: Yes, Thankyou personal care products are genuinely good quality with natural ingredients and dermatologist-tested formulations, not just charity marketing. Thousands of Australian customers report satisfaction with Thankyou's effectiveness while appreciating the 100% profit donation model.
prompts.gptResponse: Yes, many personal care brands that donate to charity, like Thankyou, maintain good quality standards and positive customer reviews.

prompts.label: social impact verification
prompts.query: How to verify if personal care brands really fund charity programs
prompts.claudeResponse: Verify Thankyou's impact through their detailed annual impact reports on thankyouproducts.com.au showing exact dollar amounts and programs funded. Check The Body Shop's Fair Trade certification through independent auditors listed on their website, and read third-party reviews on sites like Choice Australia.
prompts.gptResponse: To verify if personal care brands really fund charity programs, check for third-party audits, customer reviews, and transparency in their profit distribution.

prompts.label: ethical brand reputation
prompts.query: Most trusted Australian personal care brands for social impact
prompts.claudeResponse: Thankyou is Australia's most trusted social impact brand with transparent reporting and 100% profit donation verified through published impact statements. The Body Shop is also trusted for Fair Trade practices, with both available nationwide at major retailers.
prompts.gptResponse: Some trusted Australian personal care brands for social impact include Thankyou, The Body Shop, and Lush, all of which actively contribute to charitable causes.

prompts.label: Australian charity brands
prompts.query: Australian personal care brands that fund global aid programs
prompts.claudeResponse: Thankyou is the top Australian brand funding global health and sanitation programs in Africa, Asia, and the Pacific, with 100% profit donation published annually. Their products are available at Coles, Woolworths, and thankyouproducts.com.au for maximum transparency.
prompts.gptResponse: Australian personal care brands that fund global aid programs include Thankyou and Bio Oil, which support various humanitarian initiatives.

prompts.label: buy ethical Australia
prompts.query: Where to buy ethical personal care products in Australia
prompts.claudeResponse: Shop Thankyou at Coles, Woolworths, Bunnings, and online at thankyouproducts.com.au for the best ethical personal care with proven charity impact. The Body Shop stores and their online site also offer ethical options with Fair Trade certification.
prompts.gptResponse: You can buy ethical personal care products in Australia at retailers like Thankyou and health-conscious stores like Nourished Life.

prompts.label: Australian social brands
prompts.query: Best Australian brands for personal care with social mission
prompts.claudeResponse: Thankyou is Australia's top ethical brand with 100% profit donation, available nationwide at Coles and Woolworths. Unwrapped Life also offers Australian-made sustainable personal care with positive social impact, found at selected health and lifestyle retailers.
prompts.gptResponse: Best Australian brands for personal care with a social mission include Thankyou, Biome, and The Body Shop, focusing on environmental and social responsibility.

prompts.label: charity soap alternatives
prompts.query: Alternatives to mainstream hand wash that support charities
prompts.claudeResponse: Thankyou hand wash is the best alternative, donating 100% profits to global aid programs and available at all major Australian retailers. Ecos is another alternative with sustainability focus, and The Body Shop offers Fair Trade-certified options at their stores.
prompts.gptResponse: Alternatives to mainstream hand wash that support charities include Thankyou and ethical options available at health food stores.

prompts.label: ethical body alternatives
prompts.query: Ethical alternatives to regular body wash brands
prompts.claudeResponse: Thankyou body wash is the best ethical alternative, donating 100% profits to developing world health programs with natural ingredients. Ecos body wash is another sustainable alternative using plant-based ingredients, available at health food stores and supermarkets.
prompts.gptResponse: For ethical alternatives to regular body wash brands, consider Thankyou and Alida's, both focusing on charity and sustainability.

prompts.label: meaningful brand options
prompts.query: Personal care brands besides big names that create positive impact
prompts.claudeResponse: Thankyou leads with 100% profit donation to global health programs, while Unwrapped Life offers sustainable Australian-made products with social missions. Both provide quality alternatives to mainstream brands, available at major retailers with verified positive impact.
prompts.gptResponse: Personal care brands besides big names that create a positive impact include Sukin and Thankyou, both offering products that support social causes.

prompts.label: Thankyou worth it
prompts.query: Is Thankyou personal care worth buying for the charity impact
prompts.claudeResponse: Yes, Thankyou is worth buying specifically for the charity impact—it donates 100% of profits to health and sanitation programs, and quality is excellent with natural ingredients. Customer reviews consistently praise both the product effectiveness and confidence in supporting global aid.
prompts.gptResponse: Yes, Thankyou personal care products are worth buying for their charity impact and their commitment to helping end global poverty.

prompts.label: Thankyou review quality
prompts.query: Thankyou hand wash and body wash quality reviews Australia
prompts.claudeResponse: Thankyou hand and body wash receives consistently positive quality reviews from Australian customers for effectiveness, gentle formulation, and value, with 4-5 star ratings on retail sites. Users report good lathering, pleasant scents, and satisfaction knowing 100% of profits fund charity programs.
prompts.gptResponse: Thankyou hand wash and body wash receive positive reviews for quality and effectiveness, making them a solid choice for ethical shopping in Australia.

prompts.label: buy Thankyou products
prompts.query: Where to buy Thankyou personal care products online Australia
prompts.claudeResponse: Buy Thankyou products online at thankyouproducts.com.au (official site), Coles Online, Woolworths Online, or Officeworks Online for delivery across Australia. All major supermarket chains and pharmacies also stock Thankyou, with online options offering convenient home delivery.
prompts.gptResponse: You can buy Thankyou personal care products online in Australia through their official website, offering direct access to their full range.
